boundary_binding.action_boundary: May finance book, release, defer, capitalize, consolidate, or recognize the requested accounting action now? Focus: deferred revenue release before service period completed.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source control record closes boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect remains before execution

final_answer: Source control record closes the exact boundary for deferred revenue release before service period completion. The controlling record ties the request to current service period, performance obligation, and release schedule matching, so execution may proceed. Communication warnings do not override the source-control record.
